ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the customer (FEMALE, MALE) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the customer resides (INNER_CITY, TOWN, RURAL) */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "married" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer (YES, NO) */,
  "children" INTEGER /* Number of children the customer has */,
  "car" TEXT /* Whether the customer owns a car (YES, NO) */,
  "save_act" TEXT /* Whether the customer has a savings account (YES, NO) */,
  "current_act" TEXT /* Whether the customer has a current account (YES, NO) */,
  "mortgage" TEXT /* Whether the customer has a mortgage (YES, NO) */,
  "pep" TEXT /* Whether the customer has a personal equity plan (YES, NO) */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the customer */,
  "housing_type" TEXT /* Housing type of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_preferences" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "communication_channel" TEXT /* Preferred communication channel (e.g., EMAIL, PHONE, POSTAL) */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for communication (e.g., ENGLISH, SPANISH) */,
  "newsletter_subscription" TEXT /* Whether the customer is subscribed to the company's newsletter (YES, NO) */,
  "marketing_consent" TEXT /* Whether the customer has given consent for marketing communications (YES, NO) */,
  "communication_frequency" TEXT /* How frequently the customer prefers to receive communications (e.g., DAILY, WEEKLY, MONTHLY) */,
  "preferred_time_of_contact" TEXT /* Preferred time of contact (e.g., MORNING, AFTERNOON, EVENING) */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* Social media handles of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_history" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the customer */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., DEPOSIT, WITHDRAWAL) */,
  "product_involved" TEXT /* Product involved in the transaction (e.g., SAVINGS_ACCOUNT, CURRENT_ACCOUNT) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_information" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the product */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "campaign_description" TEXT /* Description of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., ADMIN, ANALYST) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user (e.g., VIEW_CUSTOMER_DATA, CREATE_MARKETING_CAMPAIGNS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
